meaning: n.共产主义社会的成员,提倡共产主义社会者
examples: Supposed the communitarian argument is right.
And the communitarian would say we can't even make sense, rina.
The communitarian doesn't deny that there is choice to be made.
Pandit, who moved to the United States at sixteen, is rarely described as a communitarian.
Promoting parks and public space fits neatly with the communitarian ideas beloved by the Blair government.
